subject: Legal leadership transitions
email_text:

I noticed your global practice leadership at Major, Lindsey & Africa and the way your work sits close to law firm governance and succession.

startingmonday.app helps senior operators run a cleaner transition process with outreach, prep, and follow-through in one place.

Would you be open to a short fit check next week?

Best,
Rich Rothschild
